summary: Multi-phase homepage redesign testing complete. Reviews section and Where We Serve section fully verified against design requirements. All 5 feature categories passed. Reviews: dark navy bg, amber eyebrow, grid layout, semi-transparent cards, amber stars, white author names, amber links. Where We Serve: cream bg, amber eyebrow/headings, 4px border-radius (sharp corners), white city tags with #E5E2DD border, amber phone/links. Full regression: Hero, Stats, How It Works, Services, Pricing, FAQ, Explore, Footer all working. Header sticky with functional dropdowns.
critical_code_review_comments: Reviews section uses proper grid with 3 columns for 10 reviews
ServiceAreaMapLibre.jsx correctly updated to cream/amber palette
All border-radius values are 4px as per design system
Map markers still use red fill (#C0362C) - may want to update to amber for consistency
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage redesign complete. Reviews section at #reviews has dark navy bg, 3-column grid, 10 reviews. Where We Serve at #service-area uses cream bg with amber accents. All sections use 4px border-radius. Map is lazy-loaded via IntersectionObserver - scroll slowly to trigger. Base URL: https://ahrefs-audit.preview.emergentagent.com
